title: Croatian Bean Casserole with Savory Sauce
description: A unique Japanese-inspired casserole that combines the flavors of Croatia with a creamy savory sauce.
instructions: Cook casserole noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium-high heat.
Add sliced Croatian sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add canned beans, savory sauce, and cooked noodles to the skillet.
Stir in cream cheese until melted and well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Top with grated cheddar cheese and chopped green onions.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Let the casserole rest for 10 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld.
